remarks: Welcome to this spacious second-floor apartment offering a comfortable layout and the flexibility to fit your lifestyle. Featuring 1 bedroom plus a bonus room, this home provides the perfect opportunity for a home office, guest room, nursery, or additional living space depending on your needs.  For added convenience, the apartment includes a newer in-unit washer and dryer, making laundry day simple and hassle-free. You'll also appreciate the additional storage space within the unit, helping keep your home organized year-round.  Conveniently located in Norwalk with easy access to shopping, restaurants, public transportation, and major commuting routes, this apartment is an excellent option for professionals or anyone looking for a comfortable place to call home.  Tenant is responsible for all utilities. Street parking only. Please note that there is no access to the driveway, garage, or yard.
